name: Creole Garlic and Shrimp Appetizer
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter with a wooden spoon for several minutes.
2. Add parsley, shallots, garlic, seasonings, Pernod, and 1/2 teaspoon lemon juice; mix well and set aside.
3. Coat shrimp with flour.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet; shake flour from shrimp and add them to the skillet.
5. Saute shrimp quickly, about 3 minutes; when they start to turn pink, cook on the other side for another 3 minutes.
6. Drain excess oil from the skillet.
7. Add 1/2 cup lemon juice and 3/4 cup dry white wine; shake the pan briefly over heat for 1 minute.
8. Add reserved garlic butter and toss shrimp quickly with a wooden spoon.
9. When butter is melted, serve shrimp immediately.
